The big battle of Bengal saw a steep surge in the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) brigade, as it broke into Mamata Banerjee’s long-standing bastion and dented her towering political influence across the state. The saffron camp crossed the 200-seat mark, securing a record and decisive majority for the first time.The BJP’s rise to power in West Bengal brought an abrupt end to Mamata Banerjee’s 15-year rule in the state.West Bengal voted in two phases on April 23 and April 29, recording a historic voter turnout of over 90 percent. The polling exercise also came after the Election Commission’s special intensive revision process, adding to the intensity of the electoral battle.On counting day, May 4, the saffron wave visibly overtook the Trinamool Congress’s green surge, with gains reflecting both in vote share and seat margins. The BJP secured around 46 percent of the vote, while the TMC stood at approximately 40.8 percent.The Trinamool Congress, led by Mamata Banerjee, had come to power in 2011 after ending decades of Left Front rule in the state. However, in this election cycle, it was pushed to the margins as the BJP emerged as the dominant force, marking a historic political shift in West Bengal.

Article Title: IPL points table after Match 48: CSK climb to sixth after dominant win; DC slip further in playoff race
Article Text:
DC vs CSK (ANI Photo/Rahul Singh)

Watch Ryan Rickelton gives an update on Hardik Pandya, lauds Rohit Sharma Ryan Rickelton gives an update on Hardik Pandya, lauds Rohit Sharma

Pos Team P W L NR Pts NRR 1 Punjab Kings 9 6 2 1 13 +0.855 2 Royal Challengers Bengaluru 9 6 3 0 12 +1.420 3 Sunrisers Hyderabad 10 6 4 0 12 +0.644 4 Rajasthan Royals 10 6 4 0 12 +0.510 5 Gujarat Titans 10 6 4 0 12 -0.147 6 Chennai Super Kings 10 5 5 0 10 +0.151 7 Delhi Capitals 10 4 6 0 8 -0.949 8 Kolkata Knight Riders 9 3 5 1 7 -0.539 9 Mumbai Indians 10 3 7 0 6 -0.649 10 Lucknow Super Giants 9 2 7 0 4 -1.076

Chasing 156 on a tricky surface, CSK completed the target in just 17.3 overs thanks to a brilliant unbeaten 87 from Sanju Samson. The wicketkeeper-batter anchored the chase with seven fours and six sixes, while Kartik Sharma provided strong support with an unbeaten 41 off 31 balls. After early wickets of captain Ruturaj Gaikwad and Urvil Patel, the pair steadied the innings and ensured there were no late hiccups.The victory lifted CSK to sixth place on the points table with 10 points from 10 matches and a net run rate of +0.151, keeping them firmly in the playoff race.Delhi Capitals, meanwhile, continued their poor run at home and slipped to seventh place with eight points from 10 matches and a worrying NRR of -0.949. Another defeat has now left DC under serious pressure heading into the final stretch of the league phase.Earlier, CSK bowlers produced a disciplined effort on a slow Delhi pitch to restrict DC to 155/7. Noor Ahmad picked up two wickets, while Akeal Hosein, Mukesh Choudhary, Jamie Overton and Gurjapneet Singh chipped in with one wicket each.DC were struggling at 69/5 before Tristan Stubbs (38) and Sameer Rizvi (40 not out) added 65 runs for the sixth wicket to rescue the innings. However, the total proved below par against a confident CSK batting lineup.At the top of the table, Punjab Kings remain first with 13 points, while Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Rajasthan Royals and Gujarat Titans are all tied on 12 points, intensifying the playoff race.
Article Summary: Csk complete the target in just 17.3 overs thanks to sanju samson's unbeaten 87. Csk bowlers produced a disciplined effort on a slow delhi pitch. Delhi capitals slip to seventh place with eight points from 10 matches. Punjab kings remain first with 13 points, while royal challengers bengaluru, sunrisers hyderabad and rajasthan royals are all tied on 12 points.

Article Title: Simone Biles And Jonathan Owens: “Currently in therapy”: Simone Biles opens up on Olympic mental health journey as Jonathan Owens prepares for NFL grind
Article Text:
Jonathan Owen's wife Simone Biles reveals deeper side of Olympic struggles as she reflects on her mental health journey (Getty Images)

Simone Biles reflects on Tokyo Olympics turning point as therapy remains central to her recovery

Two years after stepping away from Olympic competition, Simone Biles has shared a clear update on her mental health. The Olympic champion said she is still in therapy as she looks back at the moment that changed her career.Her remarks came during a recent interview, in which she revisited the pressure she faced at the 2020 Summer Olympics and how that phase reshaped her life.Speaking to CNN Sports journalist Amanda Davies, the living legend Simone Biles explained how the events in Tokyo pushed her to take action for her mental health. She said the experience forced her to step back and focus on herself rather than expectations.“I feel like it showed the realness to me because everyone thought I was a robot, she’s not real, but it’s like, down to the core, I’m just like you guys. I’m real. It got me the therapy that I deserved, and I’m still currently in therapy. I had a lot of help, and my core group was really helpful in letting me know that it’s OK, people go through this, and you’re just human,” Simone Biles said during the interview.At the Tokyo Olympics, Biles withdrew from several finals after struggling with the “twisties,” a condition that affects spatial awareness during routines. The decision sparked global reactions, with many questioning her choice at the time.However, that moment later became a key shift in how athletes approach mental health.“Gymnasts aren’t viewed as people who have weaknesses,” she added in the same interview. “Now, I look at it as being courageous and not so much a weakness.”Since then, Simone Biles has stepped away from regular competition and focused on her personal life. She married NFL star Jonathan Owens in May 2023, and the couple has continued to support each other through their respective careers. Owens is currently preparing for the NFL season after signing with the Indianapolis Colts.Biles has not ruled out a return to the Olympic stage. She said her decision regarding the 2028 Summer Olympics stands at “50-50” for now. A comeback would require her to return to full training after a long break, something she is still weighing carefully.Away from competition, Simone Biles has remained active in public conversations. Earlier this week, she spoke about the rising cost of public appearances, revealing she spent around $23,000 on styling for an event. The comment showed a different side of her life beyond gymnastics.Through it all, Simone Biles continues to prioritise balance. Her latest update makes it clear that her focus now lies on long-term well-being rather than immediate competition.
Article Summary: Simone biles says she is still in therapy two years after the tokyo olympics. The olympic champion has not ruled out a return to the olympic stage. She said her decision regarding the 2028 summer olympics stands at ‘50-50’ for now.

Article Title: Met Gala Fashion Highlights 2026: “That is a HORRIBLE outfit”: Fans roast Joe Burrow’s Met Gala 2026 look after QB plays it safe on fashion’s biggest night
Article Text:
Image - Met Gala X

Joe Burrow’s navy suit and how it aligned with the ‘Custom Art’ Met Gala theme

"Looks like birdshit."

After multiple high-profile appearances, fans now expect Joe Burrow to take bigger fashion risks

Joe Burrow showed up to the 2026 Met Gala and fans are NOT being quiet about it. The Cincinnati Bengals QB attended the star-studded event alongside his former LSU teammate and Minnesota Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson and while the two looked like a whole vibe walking in together, it's Burrow's outfit that's got everyone talking (and not always in a good way).Burrow stepped out in a dark navy two-piece suit with some fancy designer trim. The Bengals' own social media posted it with the caption "Joe is art." Cute, right?The theme this year was "Custom Art," so points for staying on theme, we guess. But here's the thing... this is the Met Gala. The place where people show up in full body armor and 10-foot gowns. A navy suit, no matter how expensive, is kind of... safe?So, as usual, fans did not hold back. The replies were doing the absolute most. People were calling the lookIt felt more like a fancy dinner outfit than a Met Gala moment.Some fans pointed out that Joe literally attended the Kentucky Derby just days before where he got called out for being underdressed in a t-shirt and then showed up to the biggest fashion night of the year in something still pretty tame. Like, babe, are you trolling us?To be fair, not everyone was dragging him. Some fans argued that Burrow actually looked clean and polished, and that not every athlete needs to go full Lady Gaga to deserve a spot on the carpet. He has attended two Met Galas now, which is more than most NFL players can say.Here's the tea though: this is the same guy who wore a backless suit in 2024 and broke the entire internet. He showed up to last year's Met in a light blue suit that actually had people talking positively. So the bar he set for himself? Kind of high. And this year's look just didn't hit the same. Even his own mom admitted he's been "particular about his clothes" since he was little so we know this wasn't an accident. He chose this.Hot take- Joe Burrow is undeniably one of the most fashion-forward QBs in the NFL right now. But at the Met Gala, "safe" is basically a sin. The navy suit wasn't bad, it just wasn't him. After two years of showing up, fans expect more. The pressure is real, Joe. Don't let us down in 2027.
Article Summary: Cincinnati bengals qb joe burrow attended the 2026 met gala. He wore a dark navy two-piece suit with some fancy designer trim. The bengals' own social media posted it with the caption "joe is art" after two years of showing up, fans expect more.

Article Title: What is Roger Federer and Mirka Federer's combined net worth in 2026? Inside the tennis power couple’s $1.1 billion fortune
Article Text:
What is Roger Federer and Mirka Federer's combined net worth in 2026? Inside the tennis power couple’s $1.1 billion fortune (Image via Getty)

$1.1 billion or even more

Roger Federer's net worth 2026 with endorsements and business earnings

Mirka Federer's role in wealth growth and shared net worth value

How Roger Federer and Mirka Federer built $1.1 billion combined net worth

Roger Federer and Mirka Federer are not just known for tennis anymore. In 2026, they are counted among the richest couples in sports. Their combined net worth is estimated at around, based on reports from Forbes and other sports business outlets. This huge number is not just from tennis prize money. Most of it comes from brand deals, smart investments, and long-term planning. Even after retiring, Roger Federer continues to earn in many ways, and Mirka Federer has played a big role in building this success behind the scenes.Roger Federer’s personal net worth in 2026 is estimated at around, which also helped him enter the Forbes billionaires list. His tennis prize money is about, which is very high, but still only a small part of his total wealth. The real money came from big brand deals. Federer worked with companies like Wilson, Rolex, Uniqlo, Credit Suisse, Barilla, Mercedes-Benz, and NetJets for many years. These were not short deals. They were long partnerships that kept bringing money even after he stopped playing.One of his smartest moves was investing in the Swiss shoe company On. He took a big stake in the company, and its value grew fast after going public.That one decision added a huge amount to his wealth. Even after retiring in 2022, Federer still earns from appearances, special events, and brand work. So his income did not stop when his tennis career ended. It just shifted into business and branding.Mirka Federer, whose full name is Mirka Vavrinec, was also a professional tennis player earlier. But her biggest impact came after that. She became a key part of Roger Federer’s career off the court. She helped manage his schedule, brand image, and business decisions. Many reports say she played a strong role in choosing the right partnerships and keeping his public image clean and strong. That helped increase his market value over time.There is no exact public number for Mirka’s personal net worth alone. Most financial reports treat their wealth as shared. So instead of splitting numbers, sources like Forbes mention their wealth together as a family. Because of her involvement in managing and planning, it is fair to say that this billion-dollar figure is not just Roger’s success alone. It is something they built together over many years.Their story is not just about winning matches. It is about making smart choices again and again. They focused on long-term brand deals instead of quick money. They invested early in the right places, like the On company. They also controlled Federer’s image very carefully, which made brands trust him more. They also earned through exhibition matches, charity events, and special appearances. These events still bring money even after retirement.The organisation used tennis as one of its methods to build its worldwide brand presence for Federer. The organisation showed important improvement because its employees changed their approach to work. The organisation accumulated various revenue streams until their total financial resources reached a value of more than one billion dollars. According to Forbes and similar reports, all these earnings, investments, and assets together place Roger Federer and Mirka Federer at around $1.1 billion or more in 2026.

Article Title: IPL 2026: What’s gone wrong for LSG? Pant’s form, captaincy calls, and batting woes derail campaign
Article Text:
Lucknow Super Giants captain Rishabh Pant, center, with teammates. (PTI Photo)

Watch Justin Langer finds positives in LSG defeat, praises Nicholas Pooran and backs Rishabh Pant Justin Langer finds positives in LSG defeat, praises Nicholas Pooran and backs Rishabh Pant

Playoff equation turning near-impossible

ALSO READ:

Pant’s form and leadership under scanner

Lucknow Super Giants' skipper Rishabh Pant (ANI Photo)

Bowling: decent on paper, leaking at key moments

Lucknow Super Giants' Prince Yadav and teammates. (ANI Photo)

Batting collapses define the season

Nicholas Pooran (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Constant changes and a season slipping away fast

Poll Which aspect of LSG's game needs the most improvement? Batting order stability Bowling efficiency

NEW DELHI: Nothing seems to be going right for Lucknow Super Giants in the IPL 2026 season. With six consecutive defeats, the franchise remains rooted to the bottom of the points table, and their playoff hopes are hanging by the thinnest of threads.After nine matches, LSG have just two wins and four points. Their last victory came nearly a month ago — back-to-back wins against Sunrisers Hyderabad and Kolkata Knight Riders in early April. Since then, it has been a steep and sustained decline, with defeats piling up and confidence visibly draining from the squad.Mathematically, LSG are still in contention. With five matches remaining, they can reach 14 points if they win all of them — a total that has historically been enough to sneak into the top four. But the margin for error is now zero.Three of their remaining fixtures are against teams currently in the top four, including Punjab Kings and Royal Challengers Bengaluru. One more slip-up, and their campaign is as good as over.At the centre of LSG’s struggles is captain Rishabh Pant . The league’s most expensive player has endured a disappointing season with the bat, scoring 204 runs in nine innings at an average of 25.50 and a strike rate of 128.30.For a player known for his attacking flair, those numbers underline a clear dip in impact.Pant has just one fifty-plus score this season, and his inability to convert starts has hurt LSG badly in crunch moments. His captaincy has also been questioned, particularly his constant reshuffling of the batting order. In multiple matches, LSG have fielded different opening combinations, preventing any stability at the top.After the loss to Mumbai Indians, Pant admitted, “I think we need some good luck,” a statement that reflected both frustration and the lack of answers within the camp.However, head coach Justin Langer continues to back his skipper strongly. He pointed to a recent practice game where Pant smashed a blistering 95 in under 40 balls as proof that a turnaround is close.“We played a practice game here two days ago, and Rishi… maybe 95 off 40 or 30 balls—you’re just looking at it and you go, ‘Oh my gosh, that’s Rishabh Pant at his very best,’” Langer said.Despite that reassurance, match performances have not followed, leaving Pant under growing pressure with each passing game.On paper, LSG boast one of the stronger bowling attacks in the league, with experienced internationals and exciting domestic talent. And statistically, the numbers are not alarming at first glance.LSG have conceded 200-plus totals only twice in nine games — a respectable figure in a season where high scores have been frequent. Their overall economy rate as a unit has hovered around the mid-8s, indicating decent control in phases.Young pacer Prince Yadav has been a standout performer, picking up 13 wickets in nine matches at an economy of 8.06, placing him among the top wicket-takers this season. Mohsin Khan has also chipped in with 10 wickets in just five matches, albeit at a higher economy rate of 12.However, the cracks have appeared in crucial moments. LSG conceded 254/7 against Punjab Kings — the highest total against them this season — and failed to defend 228 against Mumbai Indians. Their death bowling has been inconsistent, often allowing opponents to accelerate dramatically in the final overs.If one area truly explains LSG’s downfall, it is their batting inconsistency. The warning signs were evident from the very first match when they were bowled out for 141 at home. Even in victories, the batting unit looked fragile, scraping through chases in the final over.Across nine matches, LSG have crossed the 180-run mark only three times, while also being bowled out thrice. Their average team total has hovered around the mid-160s — well below par in a season dominated by big scores.After their early wins, the batting unit collapsed repeatedly. Scores of 164/5 and 146 all out were comfortably chased down by opponents. Against Rajasthan Royals, they were bowled out for 119 while chasing 160, highlighting their inability to handle pressure.Even in matches where the batting clicked, such as the game against Punjab Kings where they chased a massive 254, the effort fell short due to the sheer scale of the target. Against Kolkata Knight Riders, they failed to finish off and tied the match instead. And lost in the Super Over, managing just one run — a moment that summed up their struggles under pressure.Nicholas Pooran is totally out-of-form except for a 21-ball 63 against MI on Monday. Mitchell Marsh leads the scoring charts for LSG with 256 runs at a strike rate of 139.13, followed by Aiden Markram with 224 runs. However, both are outside the top 20 in the Orange Cap standings — reflecting the team’s overall underperformance.One of the defining features of LSG’s campaign has been instability. From batting-order reshuffles to changes in team combinations, the side has struggled to settle on a consistent approach.The opening pair has changed multiple times, the middle order has been shuffled frequently, and even bowling roles have lacked clarity. This lack of continuity has prevented players from finding rhythm and building partnerships.So, LSG’s struggles stem from a combination of factors: underperformance from key players, lack of batting stability, inability to close out games, and lapses in crucial moments with the ball.Despite occasional bright spots — like Prince Yadav’s emergence and isolated batting performances — the team has failed to click collectively. With six straight defeats and the toughest part of their schedule still ahead, the season is rapidly slipping away.Unless Rishabh Pant and his team produce an extraordinary turnaround, IPL 2026 is set to be remembered as a campaign where almost everything that could go wrong, did go wrong for Lucknow Super Giants.
Article Summary: Lucknow super giants are rooted to the bottom of the ipl 2026 points table. After nine matches, lsg have just two wins and four points. Captain rishabh pant has endured a disappointing season with the bat. Head coach justin langer continues to back pant strongly. Lsg conceded 254/7 against punjab kings — the highest total against them this season.

Article Title: JJ Redick makes harrowing admission about Lakers as clash with Thunder begins
Article Text:
JJ Redick. Image via: Getty Images

JJ Redick candidly admits Thunder's dominance over Lakers



JJ Redick on Thunder's Shai Gilgeous-Alexander



JJ Redick did not try to soften the truth as his Los Angeles Lakers begin a daunting playoff test. The focus shifted quickly to their Western Conference semifinal clash with the Oklahoma City Thunder, and Redick’s words reflect the painful chapters of recent history.The Lakers are already without Luka Doncic for the start of the series, and the opponent in front of them looks complete. Oklahoma City swept the Phoenix Suns in the opening round and enters with momentum. Redick knows what his group is up against, and he chose honesty over comfort.JJ Redick’s assessment was blunt, almost jarring in its simplicity. “We sucked against this team,” he said, reflecting on a regular season where the Lakers went 0-4 against Oklahoma City. The losses were not close either. Three came by double digits, and in several of those games, the offense struggled to even reach 100 points.Pressed further, Redick did not walk it back. “We couldn’t learn a lot from three of those games because we were God-awful,” he admitted, underlining just how little value he found in those matchups beyond a warning sign.Still, this is not a coach waving the white flag. The Lakers adjusted well in their first-round win over the Houston Rockets, leaning on structure and discipline.Redick pointed to that growth but made it clear it may not be enough this time.“We’ve been able to execute. I think just going back to the last three games of the regular season, we kinda had to reset with not a lot of time and build something new on the fly. I think our guys were able to find their way and find their way from an execution standpoint,” he said. Then came the reminder. “This is a different team, the best team, and it’s gonna require more.”Containing Shai Gilgeous-Alexander will be the primary challenge. Redick knows it, and so does everyone in the building. Oklahoma City’s offense flows through its MVP leader, and slowing him down is easier said than done.“A lot of that is that Shai doesn’t miss, so hopefully we can prevent him from shooting mid-range shots,” Redick explained. He pointed out the layers around him too, noting how players like Jalen Williams add pressure from similar spots on the floor. “But we’ve got to be able to both guard our yard and also do a good job of protecting the paint.”There is also a bigger concern. Redick highlighted their ability to swing games in minutes through defensive stops and quick scoring bursts. “I don’t think you have the luxury of worrying about that, because the game can get away from you so quick because of how explosive they are when they go on their runs.”For the Lakers, the margin feels thin. Without Doncic, against a team that has already handled them with ease, the path forward demands precision.
Article Summary: Los angeles lakers face oklahoma city thunder in western conference semifinal. Lakers went 0-4 against thunder in the regular season, losing three games by double digits. Lakers coach jj redick admits they were 'god-awful' in those games.

Article Title: Ipl 2026: Sanju Samson scripts history against Delhi Capitals, becomes first IPL batter to...
Article Text:
Sanju Samson (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Poll What has been the key reason for CSK’s comeback in IPL 2026? Top-order batting form Strong bowling & team balance

Partners Runs Wicket Team Opposition Ground Match Date Ruturaj Gaikwad & Devon Conway 141 1st Chennai Super Kings vs Delhi Capitals Delhi 20-May-2023 Sanju Samson & Kartik Sharma 114* 3rd Chennai Super Kings vs Delhi Capitals Delhi 5-May-2026 Sanju Samson & Ayush Mhatre 113 2nd Chennai Super Kings vs Delhi Capitals Chennai 11-Apr-2026 Robin Uthappa & Ruturaj Gaikwad 110 2nd Chennai Super Kings vs Delhi Capitals Dubai International Cricket Stadium 10-Oct-2021 Ruturaj Gaikwad & Devon Conway 110 1st Chennai Super Kings vs Delhi Capitals DY Patil Stadium 8-May-2022

Chennai Super Kings are back on track in the IPL, with their reliable opener Sanju Samson regaining form at just the right time as the team builds momentum. So far this season, Samson has scored two centuries and amassed 402 runs in 10 innings.In his yesterday's match against Delhi Capitals, he smashed an unbeaten 87 off 52 balls, which helped CSK secure an 8-wicket win and he won the Player of the Match. He also scripted history and became the the first batter ever to be part of two hundred-plus partnerships against the Delhi Capitals in a single edition of the tournament.Chennai Super Kings kept their playoff hopes alive with a dominant eight-wicket victory over Delhi Capitals at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on May 5 in IPL 2026. After restricting DC to 155/7 on a sluggish surface, CSK chased the target comfortably in just 17.3 overs.The Capitals struggled throughout their innings despite late resistance from Sameer Rizvi and Tristan Stubbs after a middle-order collapse left them reeling at 69/5. CSK’s disciplined bowling attack, led by Akeal Hosein and Noor Ahmad, never allowed DC to build momentum.In reply, Sanju Samson produced a composed unbeaten 87 off 52 balls, anchoring the chase with authority.Youngster Kartik Sharma provided excellent support as the duo stitched together an unbeaten century partnership of 114 runs to seal a comfortable win for CSK with 15 balls to spare. The defeat pushed Delhi closer to elimination, while CSK climbed back into playoff contention sitting in 5th position after a strong late-season.This was Sanju Samson's second 100-plus partnership of the season which came against the same team, Delhi Capitals. It was the fifth 100-run partnership for Chennai Super Kings against Delhi Capitals, but Sanju Samson stood out by becoming the first batter to be involved in two century partnerships against DC in the same IPL season. Meanwhile, Ruturaj Gaikwad holds the record for featuring in the most 100-run stands against Delhi overall, with three such partnerships across different seasons: 2021, 2022 and 2023.
Article Summary: Chennai super kings beat delhi capitals by eight wickets in ipl 2026. Sanju samson scored an unbeaten 87 off 52 balls to help csk to victory. He became the first batter to be involved in two 100-plus partnerships against delhi in the same ipl season.
